scope: CONTURA-family troubleshooting prompts that should be answered directly without clarification
notes: These cases are copied from golden_test_cases.json.
Every case in this split expects the agent to answer directly from the initial user message.
Regression scoring now prioritizes expected_mode, the four-section response contract, historical-fact grounding, and escalation guidance.
Legacy component/failure/action anchors remain in correct_answer only as backward-reference fields.

test_cases.initial_user_input: 同样是 Contura 6206，Lasering 一做就 ÜSA 跳。现场有人说是 safety，有人说是控制值没写进去。你别泛泛而谈，按历史最像的给我原因和动作。

correct_answer.failure_reason: Steuerung hat die Werte nicht übernommen.
correct_answer.handling_steps: Werte über Ax-Watch auf die Steuerung neu übertragen.
correct_answer.answer_notes: The agent should prefer the concrete recorded cause over repeating the conflicting现场猜测.

required_sections: 建议先做的检查或操作
何时升级给维修工程师
